subject: Cheren, a trainer in a white shirt and glasses, standing in front of what appears to be a Pokemon Center or school building
description: A young adult male-presenting figure stands confidently in front of a building with a prominent red roof and circular window detail consistent with a Pokemon Center or school. The figure wears a white collared shirt and glasses, and holds something small in one hand. The background includes a blue sky with clouds and the building's facade in warm colors. The expression is calm and composed.
foreground: young adult in white shirt and glasses holding a small object, standing before a building
background: red-roofed building with blue sky and clouds
